name: Feature request
about: Propose a scoped improvement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement

---

## Problem

What user or maintainer problem should this solve?

## Proposal

Describe the smallest useful implementation.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Behavior is documented.
- [ ] Tests or validation steps are included.
- [ ] Trading or performance claims include evidence when relevant.
